item.title: My daughter built this 6ft long glider in her high school construction class
item.description: Not only was she the only woman in the class, she was also one of only three people who completed a project.

item.title: Steve Miller to Eminem: “I’m Honored.”

* Video Below * Steve Miller posted this message to Eminem regarding his recent sample/cover of Miller’s 1982 hit song, “Abracadabra.”

item.title: Monday Summer Meme dump to help you trough the heat wave (no politics)
item.description:
1
2. Be a smooth as this dude
3. Robber vs Store lady
4
5. In case you need some morning sweat
6. Who is she?!
7. What's wrong with your cat?
8. Do you like how young people dressed back in the day?
9. American car vs. Straight Road
10
11. Women: "Men are liars" Also women:
12
13. Paranormal cativity caught on camera
14. That's the kind of pranks I'm all in for
15. If you have nothing better to do on a Monday day you can try the demo of my "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. I think the humor and the cold distant voice of the narrator will keep you good company ! Plus you get not to press a button! Can you imagine all the fun you can have not doing that? It's one for the ages! You can try on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. It's a real game, I swear! (Pls wishlist uwu)
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Be excellent to each other.
item.description: Party on, dudes!
item.dc:creator: j0lt78

item.title: Here's hoping for a fresh start!
item.description: I was a stay-at-home dad for years, ex decided to end it, refused to pay support, I didn't have enough money for rent. Incredibly, some friends started a GoFundMe to pay first and last month's rent, and between various tax goodies (yay Canada!) and side hustles like Instacart, I should be good to go till September, when my teaching job resumes. Plus the judge spent five minutes listening to us talk, cut off my ex's fancy lawyer and said she'd have to start paying support come September, assuming I'm able to get my own place. It's been a hard month. I did some couch surfing, but mostly I've been sleeping in my car. Emotionally I've really struggled to not give up hope, but my kids kept me going (they don't know I've been homeless, so don't tell them, okay?). I just wanted to add that Imgur has been absolutely priceless in my journey. You guys have really kept me going, man. I mean it. I'm literally crying as I write this part. Thanks to all of you, and to everyone who's struggling (Imgurians struggling? Get outta here, right??), don't give up. Love, Me.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Let's have a look at Rod Stewart's model railroad
item.description: Apparently Rod and a couple of his friends spent 26 years building this thing. Doesn't it look incredible? Source: https://www.threads.net/@michaelwarburton1/post/C9ZvEgpIbDo?xmt=AQGzbFhChuklj5mIyBmh_y9z3V1Fc5ajTdfLr8IS_uS6HQ

item.title: Images of Note: 11:11
item.description:
I mean...it's one way of doing this. Remember when Link's Uncle was "Hold down B to use the Ancient Technique of our people" as his dying words?
THIS
oh no
Our banknotes have otters :3c
I mean they have Magic. Also fun fact: My Little Pony, Friendship is Magic, has a better Magic system than Harry Potter in the fact that there are limits to how magic can be used. I can't believe I had to type that out.
All of them are time travellers trying to stop him from taking over the world.
now I wanna get greggs
HIS NAME IS WIDDERSHINS!
IT'S THE SHADOWMAN
HELL YEAH
HELL YEAH
SHE'S FUCKING RIGHT, ISN'T SHE
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I think I can say former feral for this one!
item.description: Yesterday the little boy went to his new home. I'm so happy for him and his people! But was also a little sad for me. Today I was rewarded with the first feral snuggle! My butt and feet were numb, my back sore. But my heart was melting!

item.title: My Huntress Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJay here— with a picture fresh off the con-floor at Florida Supercon this Sunday. This is a new one for me, and I don’t think I’ve ever felt so self-conscious, but I do really like this character so I hope y’all don’t think it looks TOO bad.
Reference 1
Reference 2

item.title: Meeting with some more Disney Cast in MegaCon Orlando 2024.
item.description:
This is how I first met Chris Sarandon, the voice actor of Jack Skellington in the Nightmare Before Christmas, at the MegaCon Orlando 2024.
This is how I met the voice actress of Mulan, Ming-Na Wen, for the first time at MegaCon Orlando 2024. It's a real honor to meet her face to face.
This is how I first met Wallace Shawn. The voice actor of Rex from Toy Story at MegaCon Orlando 2024.
item.dc:creator: Kallen00
